[爽文] [多女]
魂穿平行世界的陈凡和妹子奔现，不仅发现对方是大校花，并且还能看到对方的欲望！
“和鸵鸟学长1V1solo,并得到他的夸奖。”
乐于助人的陈凡二话不说直接满足她。
　“叮！检测到宿主第一次满足女神欲望，奖励新手大礼包一份，即刻起系统将会每天给宿主发放一万元人民币！”
陈凡刚满足一个欲望，紧接着又是三个越发劲爆的欲望。
“学长为人这么好，我要和他绑定游戏CP，不然被别人抢走了我会哭死。”
　　“今晚好开心呀，不想回宿舍了，好想找个安静的地方和学长一醉方休。”
　　......
这一晚陈凡乐此不疲，将大校花的欲望统统满足，自然也赚得盆满钵满！
从此，便一发不可收拾！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2odb8092c21d6d7dacf351acbdf795cdc7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"哔哔光波","author_id":"","book_id":"7523911581030173758","book_name":"巨爽人生，从看见校花欲望开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#606070","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1609人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7523911787742249534","read_count":"1609","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"152380"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"72","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,神豪,魂穿,系统,多女主,校花,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2odb8092c21d6d7dacf351acbdf795cdc7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779185127&x-signature=Z8pt%2BxKet3y2KGQcGpTAYcIlebo%3D","tomato_book_sta
